title: Why the Moon Changes Shape
tagline: A playful, visual guide to new moons, crescents, quarters, and full moons
summary: A kid-friendly interactive explainer where you drag the Moon around Earth, watch the sunlight shift, learn the eight phase names, and test yourself with a simple moon game.
highlights: Drag the Moon around Earth and watch the bright part change in real time.
See the eight main moon phases with big, clickable phase cards.
Learn the difference between waxing and waning with simple language.
Clear up the common mix-up between ordinary phases and Earth's shadow.
Finish with a friendly quiz that asks children to name the phase they see.
